zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell是John Camell和Joan de Plecy的兒子，於1384年出生在英國多瑟特沙維其可。他於大約1399年與Isabella Sybil Paveley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell是John Camell和Joan de Plecy的儿子，于1384年出生在英国多瑟特沙維其可。他于大约1399年与Isabella Sybil Paveley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Camell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cammell
meanings: 1 Norman, English: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos). In the 1332 example this is clearly a nickname, possibly denoting a clumsy or ill-tempered person, as in ‘Achilles? A drayman, a porter, a very camel’ (Shakespeare: Troilus and Cressida I ii 249). The other forms could alternatively belong at (2) below.
2  English: locative name from Queen Camel or West Camel (Somerset).
3 English: nickname; there has also been some confusion with Campbell , sometimes pronounced as Camel.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell was born in 1384, in Shapwick, Dorset, England as the son of John Camell and Joan de Plecy. He married Isabella Sybil Paveley about 1399, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1450, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell est né en 1384, à Shapwick, Dorset, Angleterre, fils de John Camell et Joan de Plecy. Il a épousé Isabella Sybil Paveley environ 1399, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell wurde 1384 in Shapwick, Dorset, England, als Sohn von John Camell und Joan de Plecy geboren. Er hat um 1399 in England, United Kingdom Isabella Sybil Paveley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell è nato il nel 1384 nel Shapwick, Dorset, England come figlio di John Camell e Joan de Plecy. Lui sposato Isabella Sybil Paveley circa 1399, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Camellは1384年にイギリスドールセトシャプウィックでJohn CamellとJoan de Plecyの息子として生まれた。約1399年にイギリスイギリスでIsabella Sybil Paveleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell(은)는 1384년 영국 도르세트 샤p윅에서 John Camell(와)과 Joan de Plecy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1399년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Isabella Sybil Paveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell nasceu em 1384, em Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra filho de John Camell e Joan de Plecy. Ele casou-se com Isabella Sybil Paveley aproximadamente 1399, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell родился в 1384 г. в местности шапвикк, дорсет, Англия. Его родителей звали John Camell и Joan de Plecy. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Sybil Paveley около 1399 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1450 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Camell nació en 1384, en Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra como hijo de John Camell y Joan de Plecy. Se casó con Isabella Sybil Paveley aproximadamente 1399, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1450, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
